'''鈭歯g-k-t-w''' ('''kangaktewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogi|yogi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogi|yogi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-k-t-w
|-
! Lemma
| kangaktewoko
|}
